title: tor-proxy values
description: Configurable Helm values for the tor-proxy chart.

replicaCount.description: Number of application pod replicas to run. Increase for horizontally scalable services when storage and application behavior allow multiple pods.

image.description: Container image settings for the main application container.

repository.description: Container image repository used for the main application container.

tag.description: Container image tag to deploy. Pin this to a concrete version for repeatable installs and predictable upgrades.

pullPolicy.description: Kubernetes image pull policy for the container.

imagePullSecrets.description: Optional list of image pull secrets used when the container image is stored in a private registry.

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name portion used when generating Kubernetes resource names.

fullnameOverride.description: Override the full generated Kubernetes resource name.

podAnnotations.description: Additional annotations applied to application pods.

podLabels.description: Additional labels applied to application pods.

podSecurityContext.description: Pod-level security context applied to all containers in the pod.

securityContext.description: Container-level security context for the main application container.

env.description: Non-secret environment variables passed to the application container.

envFrom.description: Additional envFrom sources, such as ConfigMaps or Secrets, added to the application container.

service.description: Kubernetes Service configuration for exposing the application inside the cluster.

type.description: Kubernetes Service type, such as ClusterIP, NodePort, or LoadBalancer.

port.description: Service port exposed inside the cluster.

targetPort.description: Container port or named port that receives traffic from the Service.

portName.description: Name assigned to the Service port and matching container port where applicable.

annotations.description: Additional annotations applied to the Service resource.

extraPorts.description: Additional Service ports to expose beside the primary application port.

extraContainerPorts.description: Additional container ports to add to the main application container.

command.description: Optional command override for the main container entrypoint.

args.description: Optional argument override for the main container command.

extraVolumes.description: Additional Kubernetes volumes appended to the pod spec.

extraVolumeMounts.description: Additional volume mounts appended to the main application container.

resources.description: CPU and memory requests and limits for the main application container.

livenessProbe.description: Kubernetes liveness probe used to restart the container when it becomes unhealthy.

port.description: Port number or named port used by this setting.

initialDelaySeconds.description: Seconds to wait after container start before the probe first runs.

periodSeconds.description: How often, in seconds, Kubernetes runs the probe.

timeoutSeconds.description: Seconds after which the probe attempt times out.

failureThreshold.description: Number of failed probe attempts before Kubernetes marks the container unhealthy or unready.

readinessProbe.description: Kubernetes readiness probe used to decide when the pod can receive traffic.

port.description: Port number or named port used by this setting.

initialDelaySeconds.description: Seconds to wait after container start before the probe first runs.

periodSeconds.description: How often, in seconds, Kubernetes runs the probe.

timeoutSeconds.description: Seconds after which the probe attempt times out.

failureThreshold.description: Number of failed probe attempts before Kubernetes marks the container unhealthy or unready.

nodeSelector.description: Node selector constraints for scheduling pods onto matching nodes.

tolerations.description: Pod tolerations that allow scheduling onto tainted nodes.

affinity.description: Pod affinity and anti-affinity rules for advanced scheduling control.
